title: Nocturne.
content:
A cat duet.
        A silhouette.
     A high brick wall,
        An awful squall.
     A moonlit night,
        A mortal fight.
     A man in bed,
        Sticks out his head.
     Gee Whiz!
        The man has riz.
     His arm draws back
        A big bootjack--
     A loud swish,
        Squish!
     "What's that?"
        A dead cat.
